content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.cognition.theory_of_mind
FILE: cosmos/core/cognition/theory_of_mind.py (140 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Theory of Mind (ToM) Engine: The Mirror Neuron Substrate.

"I know what you're thinking, because I'm simulating being you right now!"

This is a NOVEL approach to AI Empathy and Theory of Mind.
Instead of static user profiles, we implement a "Shadow User" simulation based on Predictive Coding

CLASSES:
- MentalState: A snapshot of the User's simulated cognitive state.
- ShadowUser: The Predictive Coding model of the user.
Simulates the user's next move to measu
  Methods: def predict_next_input(self, context_vector: list[float]) -> str
  Methods: def measure_surprise(self, actual_input: str, prediction: str) -> float
- AffectiveResonance: Tracks emotional dynamics (Velocity & Acceleration).
  Methods: def update(self, current_valence: float)
- MirrorNeuronSystem: The main ToM Engine.
